meanings.definition: a fricative sound (especially as an expression of disapproval)
examples: the performers could not be heard over the hissing of the audience

meanings.definition: become quiet or still; fall silent
cause to be quiet or not talk
examples: Please silence the children in the church!
The audience fell silent when the speaker entered

meanings.definition: run water over the ground to erode (soil), revealing the underlying strata and valuable minerals
